# Expedia

Discover and search flights and hotels worldwide. Get real-time pricing and availability to plan your perfect trip.

You can use Expedia to:

**Search for hotel deals:**  
"Show me great hotel deals in Orlando for spring break"

**Find flights:**  
"Help me find a business class flight to NYC for next weekend"

**Get hotel and room details:**  
Click on hotel cards to see more details about each property and see real-time room availability and pricing
